jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Lenskart
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a SEO Specialist in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
